overview: ICP Mint Studio is a canister-native NFT minting and verification platform on the Internet Computer, enabling users to mint, verify, and manage digital assets fully on-chain.
features: Mint NFTs with full on-chain metadata storage
Verify NFT authenticity by Token ID, Creator ID, or shareable link
Shareable /verify/{nftUniqueId} URL for permanent proof pages
Official logo displayed in Header, Mint Success, and Landing Page
Backend is sole authority for NFT identity — no frontend reconstruction
Admin-only tier assignment via ICP payment proof flow
In-app notification bell for mint, transfer, and admin events
